programme.title: Marcello Mio
programme.desc: When her life turns to turmoil, Chiara decides to live her father's life, Marcello. 2024. Italy. Director: Christophe Honore. Starring: Chiara Mastroianni, Catherine Deneuve.

programme.title: Drazen
programme.desc: Follow basketball legend Drazen Petrovic from determined young talent to global icon. 2024. Croatia. Directors: Danilo Serbedzija, Ljubo Zdjelarevic. Starring: Zrinka Cvitesic, Domagoj Nizic.

programme.title: The Living End
programme.desc: Two HIV positive men become lovers, and begin a dangerous journey together, their motto? \"F**k the world\". 1992. United States. Director: Gregg Araki. Starring: Mike Dytri, Craig Gilmore.

programme.title: The French Job
programme.desc: A comedic theory of what might have happened to the five masterpieces heisted from Musee de Paris. 2026. France. Director: Dominique Baumard. Starring: Melvil Poupaud, Sofiane Zerman.

programme.title: Kung-Fu Master!
programme.desc: A mother in her forties finds herself falling into an intense romanic affair with a 14-year-old boy. 1988. France. Director: Agnes Varda. Starring: Jane Birkin, Mathieu Demy.

programme.title: Within The Pines
programme.desc: Sound recordist, Sam Evans, is recording in a remote forrest when he hears a blood curdling scream. 2024. Australia. Director: Paul Evans Thomas. Starring: Brendan Cooney, Barrie Cotton.

programme.title: Mysterious Skin
programme.desc: Two young boys' childhood trauma leads them both down two different paths in life. 2004. United Kingdom, Netherlands. Director: Gregg Araki. Starring: Brady Corbet, Joseph Gordon-Levitt.

programme.title: LA Porta Rossa
programme.desc: 1/1. Cagliostro knows one of the victims of a car accident. What aid can he give? 2023. Italy. Director: Gianpaolo Tescari. Starring: Lino Guanciale.

programme.title: LA Porta Rossa
programme.desc: 1/2. Cagliostro is in two minds about using Vanessa as a confidante. 2023. Italy. Director: Gianpaolo Tescari. Starring: Lino Guanciale.

programme.title: Death Without Mercy
programme.desc: Following the tragic 7.8 magnitude earthquake in Syria, two Syrian families are left to pick up the pieces. 2024. UK, USA. Director: Waad Al-Kateab.

programme.desc: A comedic theory of what might have happened to the five masterpieces heisted from Musee de Paris. 2026. France. Director: Dominique Baumard. Starring: Melvil Poupaud, Sofiane Zerman.

programme.desc: Lift up the cover of America's coporate controlled food industry. 2023. USA. Director: Robert Kenner.

programme.title: Twiggy
programme.desc: The life story of one of the world's greatest 'IT\" girls, from a working class childhood to the front cover, this is Twiggy. 2024. United Kingdom. Director: Sadie Frost.

programme.title: The House Within
programme.desc: This feature-length documentary draws a contemplative portrait of the kiwi writer Fiona Kidman and her inner world. 2024. NZ. Director: Joshua Prendeville.
